testcase.name: test_po_learning_tumaloc

error.message: failed on setup with "pytest.PytestRemovedIn9Warning: 'test_po_learning_tumaloc' requested an async fixture 'db', with no plugin or hook that handled it. This is usually an error, as pytest does not natively support it. This will turn into an error in pytest 9. See: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/deprecations.html#sync-test-depending-on-async-fixture"

testcase.error: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:458: in setup return super().setup() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:728: in pytest_fixture_setup return (yield) ^^^^^ E pytest.PytestRemovedIn9Warning: 'test_po_learning_tumaloc' requested an async fixture 'db', with no plugin or hook that handled it. This is usually an error, as pytest does not natively support it. This will turn into an error in pytest 9. E See: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/deprecations.html#sync-test-depending-on-async-fixture
